name_cn:
🌷【New】Gucci Horsebit 1955 Small Shoulder Bag
Presenting the new Gucci Horsebit 1955 bag, inspired by the brand's equestrian heritage with its double ring and long strip design. This small shoulder bag is crafted from new GG canvas with a unique heat-pressed pattern for a soft and refined touch.
Exclusive to Mainland China, Hong Kong, Macao, and Taiwan
Beige and dark brown GG canvas, soft and refined
Gucci Rosso Ancora leather trim
Light gold-tone hardware
Brown cotton-linen blend lining
Front detail: Horsebit
Sides detail: Half horsebit
Interior: 3 compartments, 1 zip pocket
Adjustable leather shoulder strap
Flap closure
Model: 815178
Dimensions: 25.9(L) x 17.5(W) x 9.9cm(H)
Color: Red PVC / Original leather
Italian creation
